meta.title: VC Panel on Investing in ICS Security
meta.description:
Dale Peterson talks with Tyler Williams of Shell Technology Ventures and Patrick Heim of ClearSky. Both Tyler and Patrick are VC's who invest in ICS security companies. They begin by discussing their respective fund's goals and what they are investing in. 

Shell is a bit different in that ROI is not their only criteria. They will invest in companies that they believe can make a big difference in their business.

Do they believe ICS and IIoT startups are a good segment to invest VC money in? Why would a venture company want to fund a company in a very crowded niche segment like ICS Detection?

And much, much more.
